title: PGM Sounds
description: Resource Pack for the PGM Plugin
body:
# PGM Sounds by MonstoBusta
The vanilla sound pack, while great for Minecraft, does not fit the tone of a plugin like PGM. In addition, some sounds are way too loud while others are way too quiet. By making this resource pack, I wish to help create an experience on PGM servers like Overcast Community that both sounds great and gives players a competitive edge without having to damage their hearing.

## The Pack:
Sounds that would be too loud yet frequent in the plugin, like the objective clear sound and fireworks, have been replaced with quieter sounds
![image1](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/1045617472058949673/1045617569714946128/Annoyingly_Loud_Sounds_now_Pleasantly_Quiet.png?width=2560&height=1440)

Sounds that are quiet to the player's disadvantage, like footsteps, have been replaced with louder sounds
![image2](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/1045617472058949673/1045617608130580480/Audible_Footsteps.png?width=2560&height=1440)

Other out of place vanilla sounds, like the game end sound, have been replaced with music
![image3](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/1045617472058949673/1045617622798041108/Victory_Music.png?width=2560&height=1440)

## Feedback
Please consider providing feedback in the discord linked in the sidebar. It would be incredibly helpful to know what works and what doesn't in an organized place!
